$comment: MCP server suggestions for this boilerplate — all entries are DISABLED by default. To enable a server, move it out of the `_disabled` stub and into `mcpServers`, replace env placeholders, and restart your agent client. Do NOT commit real credentials. The boilerplate ships this file so every clone gets the same starting menu.

_disabled.$comment: Uncomment by copying an entry into `mcpServers` above.

postgres.$why: Introspect the local Postgres container for schema-aware queries during feature work.

playwright.$why: Drive a headless browser during e2e development; pair with tests/e2e/.

filesystem-repo.$why: Read-only filesystem access scoped to this repo. Useful when the agent client lacks native file tools.

github.$why: Query PRs, issues, and CI runs without shelling out to gh.
